extract: Qwilfish (Japanese: ハリーセン Harysen) is a dual-type Water/Poison Pokémon introduced in Generation II. In Hisui, Qwilfish has a dual-type Dark/Poison regional form. Hisuian Qwilfish evolves into Overqwil when leveled up while knowing Barb Barrage. Johtonian Qwilfish is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon. In the modern day, Hisuian Qwilfish can be found in Blueberry Academy's Terarium. (Specifics may differ in past games. Refer to Game data→Evolution data for these details.)
